attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
TO_CHAR(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ACCOUNTED_CR ),
TO_CHAR(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ACCOUNTED_DR ),
MF_GL_JE_LINES.AMOUNT_INCLUDES_TAX_FLAG, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE1,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE1,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE2,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE2,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE3,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE3,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE4,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE4,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE5,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE5,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE6,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE6,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE7,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE7,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE8,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE8,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE9,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE9, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.CODE_COMBINATION_ID, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.CREATED_BY, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.CREATION_DATE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.DESCRIPTION,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') DESCRIPTION,
MF_GL_JE_LINES.EFFECTIVE_DATE, 
TO_CHAR( MF_GL_JE_LINES.ENTERED_CR),
TO_CHAR( MF_GL_JE_LINES.ENTERED_DR), 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.GES_UPDATE_DATE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') GLOBAL_NAME,
MF_GL_JE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_ID, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.GL_SL_LINK_TABLE, 
TO_CHAR( MF_GL_JE_LINES.INVOICE_AMOUNT), 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.INVOICE_DATE, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.INVOICE_IDENTIFIER, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.JE_HEADER_ID, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.JE_LINE_NUM, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.LINE_TYPE_CODE, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.NO1,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ')NO1,   
MF_GL_JE_LINES.PERIOD_NAME, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_1,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_1,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_10,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_10, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_2,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_2,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_3,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_3,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_4,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_4, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_5,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_5, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_6,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_6, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_7,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_7, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_8,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_8, 
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.REFERENCE_9,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') REFERENCE_9, 
CASE WHEN MF_GL_JE_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME='US' THEN SET_OF_BOOKS_ID 
     WHEN MF_GL_JE_LINES.GLOBAL_NAME='BE' THEN LEDGER_ID END AS SET_OF_BOOKS_ID ,   
MF_GL_JE_LINES.STATUS, 
MF_GL_JE_LINES.JEBE_VAT_ALLOC_FLAG,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE15,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE15,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE10,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE10,
REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(MF_GL_JE_LINES.ATTRIBUTE12,CHR(9),' '),CHR(234),'e'),CHR(10),' '),CHR(13),' ') ATTRIBUTE12  
FROM
 MF_GL_JE_LINES 
WHERE
MF_GL_JE_LINES.GES_UPDATE_DATE>TO_DATE('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS')
